data.name: <auth-only:string>
data.notes: InterLAN-IX is Romania’s national, neutral Internet Exchange platform, operated by the Interlan Association. With presence in key cities across the country, it facilitates direct and efficient interconnection between local networks, supporting the growth of the Romanian internet ecosystem through openness, reliability, and community collaboration.

data.notes: Republican Unitary Enterprise "National Traffic Exchange Center"

data.name: <auth-only:string>
data.notes:
Linxdatacenter with headquarters in Amsterdam, The Netherlands, is a global provider of high-end colocation, cloud and connectivity solutions for business. Active since 2001, Linxdatacenter operates in Central and Eastern Europe, Russia, Asia and the Nordics. 

Linxdatacenter provides cloud and colocation solutions at its TIER III compliant data centers in Moscow and Saint Petersburg, as well as at partner data centers in Warsaw, Shanghai and Hong Kong. It also offers fast connectivity to global cloud services, such as Amazon Web Services and Google Cloud Platform.

The company’s data centers are certified under ISO 27001, ISO 9001 and PCI DSS standards. High operation standards of Linxdatacenter are confirmed by the Uptime Institute's Management & Operations Stamp of Approval. The company enables international enterprises to optimize their IT infrastructure and to comply with personal data legislation. 

Solutions portfolio:
- Colocation
- Private and public cloud solutions (on traditional or hyperconvergent platform)
- Private access to global clouds (Direct Cloud Connect)
- Network infrastructure as a service (NaaS)
- Backup as a service (BaaS)
- Disaster recovery as a service (DRaaS)
- Software licensing as a service (SLaaS)
- Connectivity
- Remote Hands, Smart Hands

Locations:
Linxdatacenter Moscow, Russia

Total area: 4,400 sq.m

Total power: 5 MW

Reliability level: Tier III

Connectivity: diverse & redundant fiber connectivity to key PoPs, M8, presence at M9 and M1, connection to the MSK-IX, ~40 telecom operators

Linxdatacenter St.Petersburg, Russia

Total area: 9,000 sq.m

Total power: 12 MW

Reliability level: Tier III

Connectivity: diverse & redundant fiber connectivity to key PoPs and to the SPB-IX, ~20 telecom operators

This building is the most well connected in the market. As the original carrier hotel, all LEC's are built in as well as multiple smaller networks and sub facility data centers. All connectivity runs via the meet-me-room locate on Level B1. 

Contact help@deepedgetech.com for more information on interconnection or leasing assistance at 180 E Broad.

data.name: <auth-only:string>
data.notes:
GlobalConnect is the merge of the following companies and many other previous merges:
- GlobalConnect (DK/DE)
- Nianet (DK)
- Zen Systems (DK)
- BaneTele (NO)
- Ventelo (NO)
- Broadnet (NO)
- Kvantel (NO)
- PowerTech (NO)
- Xfiber (NO)
- IP-Only (SE)
- DGC (SE)
- Availo Networks (SE)

All networks are gradually being unified under AS6797, the future primary peering and transit ASN for GlobalConnect.

data.name: <auth-only:string>
data.notes:
NTS Workspace AG (AS15576) has implemented RPKI Route Origin Validation. 
We will reject invalid prefixes across our network and may also reject unknown prefixes received from peers and Tier2 providers. We recommend that all network operators ensure their advertised prefixes have valid Route Origin Authorizations (ROAs).

data.name: <auth-only:string>
data.notes: WNET is intensively developing peering with CDNs, global carriers, and local ISPs with a significant customer base. Facts and numbers about WNET: 11 countries, 100+ cities, 40+ IXPs, 8500km of metro fiber networks with 6700+ OnNet POPs. 2000+ direct peering across the globe. The core services are IP-Transit, MPLS/VPN transport, last miles, B2B and B2C internet access, IT services, colocation, and voice.
